name: compliance-specialist subagent: rejects a frontmatter whose prompt_migration_status is outside {original, migrated-zero-delta, migrated-with-delta:<reason>}
command:
mkdir -p fixture && printf -- '---
name: review-compliance
model: sonnet
prompt_id: review-compliance
prompt_version: 1.0.0
model_rationale: complex compliance reasoning needs sonnet
eval_dataset: evals/datasets/agents/review-compliance.jsonl
prompt_migration_status: experimental
---
body
' > fixture/bad.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-subagent-frontmatter.sh" "$PWD/fixture/bad.md" --field prompt_migration_status --enum
